overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along a desert highway approaching a futuristic metropolis. The camera moves smoothly past large billboards and power lines with the sun-drenched city skyline visible in the distance. Sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane road as the scene transitions from billboard-dotted wasteland to open highway with an overpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with large advertising billboards

events.description: vehicle passes by on the right side of the highway
passing under the large billboard gantry structure

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the highway shoulder approaching massive billboard structures

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving along the highway parallel to ego

entered.detail: large metal framework supporting digital advertisements with 'CYBERPUNK 2077' visible
futuristic metropolis with glass skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance
dry grass and small bushes lining the highway shoulder
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-baked desert highway with large digital billboards looming on the right. The camera moves forward past sparse desert vegetation, approaching the massive metal gantry of the billboards. A vehicle passes by on the right as the futuristic city skyline remains visible in the distant haze, with power pylons lining the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with panoramic city skyline view

events.description: large circular stadium structure becomes prominent on the left side
camera pans left to reveal more of the city skyline and highway ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway with the camera panning to showcase the sprawling cityscape on the left

entered.detail: large circular sports arena with tiered seating visible on the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboards, the scene opens up to reveal a massive stadium on the left and the futuristic city skyline now dominating the left side of the frame. The camera continues driving forward while panning to capture the urban panorama. Power pylons continue to line the road as the highway stretches ahead toward a distant overpass structure.

events.description: highway overpass structure becomes the dominant feature ahead

agents.ego_description: driving toward a large highway interchange with the overpass structure looming ahead

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling in the same direction ahead on the highway

entered.detail: elevated highway interchange structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the highway stretching toward a large overpass interchange. The stadium has receded into the distance while the overpass structure grows larger in the center of the frame. The camera continues driving along the empty asphalt lanes marked with white directional arrows, with power lines still visible on the left and sparse traffic ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a sun-baked desert highway that gradually transitions from a billboard-dotted wasteland into the sprawling outskirts of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by gliding past massive digital billboards and sparse desert vegetation, with power pylons lining the road and a distant city skyline shimmering in the haze. As the camera clears the billboards, the view opens up to reveal a massive stadium and a dominating urban panorama that shifts into the left side of the frame. The scene then expands across the stretching asphalt, leaving the stadium behind as the camera focuses on the road's white directional arrows. Finally, the movement culminates as the highway leads directly toward a large, looming overpass interchange under the wide desert sky.
